summary.intent: Audit and complete PR #653 implementing four compaction modes (deterministic, llm_replace, recency_preserving, structured) for the moltis project to ensure nothing was missing before review.
summary.outcome: Found and fixed a real bug where memory-file snapshot and AfterCompaction hook received wrong content for recency_preserving and structured modes; added regression tests including an iterative re-compaction test; all 219 tests pass with clean fmt/clippy/build across both feature configurations.

repo: compaction_run.rs is the central dispatcher; shared helpers (compute_boundaries, finalize_kept, in_place_prune_or_err, prune_tool_results_before, sanitize_tool_pairs, build_middle_marker, extract_previous_summary) are reused across recency_preserving and structured strategies
llm-compaction is a cargo feature (default-on) that gates both LLM strategies; disabling it leaves the two deterministic modes available and everything still compiles clean
Feature is forwarded through moltis-gateway and into moltis-cli default feature list
structured mode has iterative re-compaction: detects prior summary in head and passes it to the prompt, with automatic fallback to recency_preserving on LLM failure or empty summary
summary_model and max_summary_tokens fields exist on CompactionConfig but are not yet wired into provider resolution (deferred to moltis-8me)

code.finding: Bug: for recency_preserving and structured modes, compacted[0] is the first head message (e.g. 'user 0'), not the summary — so memory-file snapshot and AfterCompaction hook received wrong content. Fixed by extracting summary via extract_summary_body helper.

Added extract_summary_body helper covering all four modes, regression tests for it, and structured_mode_forwards_previous_summary_on_recompaction test using Arc<Mutex<bool>> flag to verify the previous summary reaches the provider prompt.

workflow: Systematic PR audit checklist approach: memory-file correctness, hook payloads, serialization, stale test references, workspace build, and PR description freshness
Use Arc<Mutex<bool>> flag pattern in tests to verify provider receives expected prompt content without requiring full integration setup
Verify both feature configurations (default and --no-default-features) compile and lint clean before pushing

friction: Multiple fmt/clippy/test cycles were needed to get the new tests into a clean state, requiring iterative edits to compaction_run.rs
PR description had gone stale after post-push fixes were added, requiring an update commit
open_items: moltis-8me (p3): auxiliary-model subsystem to route compaction to a cheap model (e.g. Gemini Flash) different from the session primary model — summary_model and max_summary_tokens on CompactionConfig are defined but not wired into provider resolution
PR #653 description needed updating after the memory-file fix commit was added post-push
